topics.name: Scalability Basics
topics.story_hook: Your side project has 10 users and runs on one laptop. What changes when it has 10 million? System design answers that.
discussion_prompts: How would you scale a URL shortener to 1B requests/day?
What breaks first when you 10x traffic on a monolith?
When should you add a CDN?

topics.name: Databases at Scale
topics.story_hook: One database server is simple. A hundred is a distributed systems problem.
discussion_prompts: How do you handle writes when your primary goes down?
When is eventual consistency acceptable? When isn't it?
Design a sharding key for a Twitter-like feed.

topics.name: Caching Strategies
topics.story_hook: The fastest query is the one you don't run. Caching is about remembering answers you've already computed.
discussion_prompts: When would you use write-through vs cache-aside?
How do you prevent cache stampede when a hot key expires?
Design a cache hierarchy for a news homepage.

topics.name: Message Queues & Async Processing
topics.story_hook: A restaurant doesn't make every customer wait for their dish to be plated. Orders go to the kitchen queue. Queues decouple fast front-of-house from slow back-of-house.
discussion_prompts: Why are queues idempotent consumers important?
When would you choose Kafka over SQS?
Design the order flow for a food-delivery app.

topics.name: Classic System Design Interviews
topics.story_hook: Every FAANG interview asks 'design X'. The answer isn't memorized — it's a structured walk through requirements, scale estimates, components, tradeoffs.
discussion_prompts: Design Instagram (feed, stories, DMs)
Design a chat system like WhatsApp
Design a rate limiter
Design a URL shortener at 1B/day
Design YouTube's video upload + playback
Design a distributed log (Kafka)
Design Google Docs collaborative editing
Design Uber's matching + dispatch
